issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1399: remaining Python asset sweep 9/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1399 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `c8e9d79c`.
The first direct push was rejected after `origin/main` advanced to `3db3516b`.
Rebasing the lane onto `origin/main` produced local tip `5645d197`, which passed the targeted regression guard in `0.595s`.
A second direct push to `origin/main` was rejected after `origin/main` advanced to `5c545938`.
A second rebase replayed the two lane commits onto `origin/main`, producing initial published tip `3ce11e38`.
The metadata closeout commit `3f029514` was followed by metadata-sync commit `4ea9ec0e`.
The final published tip on `origin/big-go-1399` is `4ea9ec0e`.
